indicator.title: Median weeks unemployed
indicator.notes: BLS CPS Table A-12 median unemployment duration; BLS API verified on 2026-06-03.

observations.footnotes: Data unavailable due to the 2025 lapse in appropriations.
January 2026 estimates were revised to incorporate updated population controls. For more information, see www.bls.gov/cps/documentation.htm#pop.
